name: /pr-source-remove --force operation logs a warning entry to the merkle-chained audit log for traceability
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro pr-corpus/evidence compliance && printf 'sources: []
operator_namespace: [{id: my-src}]
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && printf 'rule_id: r1
provenance:
  - {source_id: my-src, sole_evidence: true}
' > pr-corpus/evidence/r1.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-remove.sh" my-src --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --evidence-dir pr-corpus/evidence --force --audit-log compliance/audit.log --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"event":"force-remove-pr-source"' compliance/audit.log && grep -q '"source":"my-src"' compliance/audit.log && echo ok 1>&2
